_about: FROZEN regression corpus — the 22 real findings Groundtruth emitted across 14 of its own live sessions (2026-06-30 .. 07-02), hand-labeled. This is the north-star: every precision fix must move a line from FP→handled WITHOUT flipping any TP. Buckets follow the empirical scorecard + Fable advisories. sample-skew: most sessions were self-development (auditing GT's own source/docs/fixtures), so bucket-1 rates are inflated vs a normal repo — but not zero, because real repos DO document forbidden tokens and DO carry example keys.
_north_star: target < 1 non-actionable finding per 5 sessions; any check with block-severity must have near-zero measured FP or it loses block privileges.

_labels.TP: true positive (working as intended — never demote)
_labels.CAVEAT: honest disclosure surfaced as a finding (wrong channel)

findings.label: FP
findings.note: stub check flagged its OWN regex literal `const STUB_MARKER_RE = /\b(TODO|FIXME|XXX|HACK)\b/` — TODO in a regex literal is a mention, not a stub
